name: Legendary Soldier
description: Legendary Soldier is a Legendary Commando class mod made by Dahl. It can drop from most appropriate loot sources, with higher drop chances from Vermivorous the Invincible, Pete the Invincible, and Voracidous the Invincible.
notes:
A one-time Legendary Soldier can be taken from the Diamond Plate Loot Chest. The item card caption reads: "The power of the Atlas Crimson Lance meets the accuracy of Dahl's special forces."

Its flavour line references a Roland quote from Borderlands when opening a chest.

special.description:
Max-level bonuses: +51% cooldown rate, +41.8% gun damage, +36.8% fire rate. The item card may show an incorrect fire rate value.

Red text: "It's like Christmas." This mod boosts 6 skills rather than the usual 5 for most legendary class mods.
special.title: "It's like Christmas."
